# HugoKit

> HugoKit is a free Mac app for the Hugo static site generator: it runs the local server with live-reloading preview, checks every site before publishing (preflight with approve-a-diff auto-fixes), and publishes to GitHub Pages or your own server over FTP/SFTP. No terminal needed. It works as a companion to any code editor or AI coding agent — content stays plain Markdown on disk, and the preview reloads on save.

- Free: no license, no subscription, no account, no cloud
- Requires macOS 26 (Tahoe) or later
- Personal, non-commercial project by Anders Mortensen (Denmark)

## Pages

- [Home](https://hugokit.com/): what HugoKit is, why it exists, features, FAQ, download
- [Changelog](https://hugokit.com/changelog/): release notes per version
- [Download](https://github.com/andersmortensen/hugokit/releases/latest/download/HugoKit.dmg): latest release (DMG)
- [What is Hugo?](https://gohugo.io): the static site generator HugoKit runs
